channel.title: Comments for page "The Farm"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Farm"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Great article, exploring a very plausible system for boxing a variety of blackboxing and analysis systems. Now we need some exploration of this FoundationOs!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I also very much appreciated that phrase. I like this quite well, and the techie-inese warmed my heart.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nicely written, and an appropriate follow up, in my opinion.

item.title: Note from the author.
item.content:encoded:
This is the long-overdue followup to SCUTTLE, which I intentionally left with a cliffhanger. I'd considered a follow-up right in the thick of trying to defuse the situation, but it was ultimately uninteresting and no way to arrive at falling action that wasn't terrible Hollywood ham-fistedness. So I arrived at this. Make the eyes glaze over with technobabble, show off some cool toys I have in my head that I think the Foundation can manage, and let people know that they made it through somehow.

I do not see this scoring particularly high but it says what I want it to say, and it leaves me my characters for future articles.

Thanks for reading.
